gene_information_merger.Summary: KRAS, a GTPase which functions as an upstream regulator of the MAPK and PI3K pathways, is frequently mutated in various cancer types including pancreatic, colorectal and lung cancers.
PIK3CA, the catalytic subunit of PI3-kinase, is frequently mutated in a diverse range of cancers including breast, endometrial and cervical cancers.
PIK3CA, the catalytic subunit of PI3-kinase, is frequently mutated in a diverse range of cancers including breast, endometrial and cervical cancers.
PIK3CB, a catalytic subunit of PI3-kinase, is altered by amplification or mutation in various cancer types.
